articles.title: Mahashivaratri celebrations trigger great religious fervour in Kalaburagi
articles.summary: The Mahashivaratri festival was celebrated with great religious fervour across Kalaburagi on Sunday. Hundreds of devotees from the city and surrounding villages thronged the Shiva temple at Ramteerth, located on the outskirts of the city, to offer their prayers. Many waited in long queues from early in the morning. The city wore a festive look, with temples beautifully decorated for the occasion. Besides Ramteerth, large numbers of devotees visit

articles.title: Ancient Egyptian artifacts stolen from Australian museum
articles.summary: Australia Ancient Egyptian artifacts stolen from Australian museum Authorities quickly recovered the stolen treasures, including a 2,600-year-old wooden cat statue, a mummy mask and an ancient necklace. Egyptian artifacts that were stolen from Abbey Museum of Art and Archaeology in Caboolture, in Queensland, Australia, on Friday. articles.title: North Korea opens new housing district for families of Ukraine war dead
articles.summary: North Korea said Monday it completed a new housing district in Pyongyang for families of North Korean soldiers killed while fighting alongside Russian forces in Ukraine , the latest effort by leader Kim Jong Un to honor the war dead. State media photos showed Kim Jong Un walking through the new street — called Saeppyol Street — and visiting the homes of some of the families with his increasingly prominent daughter, believed to be named Kim Ju Ae
